\tzpentry{ID4293}{Potential Bound}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4293 introduces Potential Bound as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\dot{V}(x) = \nabla V \cdot f(x) + \frac{1}{2} Tr(D^T \nabla^2 V D) \leq 0$
\]
